# mpbarbosa.com — Full LLM Context

**Name**: Marcelo Pereira Barbosa

**Experience**: 25+ years in software development

**GitHub**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa
**LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mpbarbosa/

**Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/mpbarbosa1971/
**Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/mpbarbosa

## Focus areas

- AI-assisted development tooling (primary focus)
- JavaScript / TypeScript libraries and automation
- Geolocation and mapping applications
- Shell scripting and Linux automation
- Music technology (Strudel live coding)

---

## Flagship mission: ai_workflow

**Mission statement**: ai_workflow is building the automation layer that makes AI-assisted development reliable — so teams can trust what any AI coding tool generates before it ships.

**Repository**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/ai_workflow
**Version**: v4.3.0
**License**: MIT
**Languages**: Bash (orchestration), Node.js (tooling), Python (utilities)

### What it does

ai_workflow is a 23-step automated pipeline that validates and enhances code quality, documentation, and test coverage across software projects. It integrates with all major AI coding tools through a modular AI personas system, making AI-generated output trustworthy before it ships.

### Key metrics

- 111 total modules: 81 libraries + 22 steps + 4 orchestrators + 4 configs
- 17 AI personas for specialised validation tasks
- 23-step pipeline with checkpoint resume
- 37+ automated tests, 100% test coverage
- B+ (87/100) code quality score
- 40–85% faster execution via smart change detection
- 33% additional speedup via parallel execution
- 60–80% token reduction via AI response caching
- Supports: GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude, Codeium, Tabnine, and all major AI coding tools

### Requirements

- Bash 4.0+
- Git
- Node.js v18+
- yq (YAML processor)
- Optional: any compatible AI coding tool CLI (Copilot, Claude, Cursor, etc.)

### Funding

ai_workflow is seeking public investment on Singularity (https://singularity.diy) to fund ongoing developer time.
Fund requests are voted on by token holders — 4 of 6 top investors must approve each request.
Investors receive tradable mission tokens; no equity is issued.
All fund requests and votes are publicly visible on-chain (Solana/USDC).

---

## Other projects

### Onde Estou?

**URL**: https://mpbarbosa.com/guia_js/
Real-time geolocation app. Displays user position on a map using the browser Geolocation API. Built with vanilla JavaScript via AI-assisted development.

### Music in Numbers

**URL**: https://mpbarbosa.com/music_in_numbers/src/music_in_numbers.html
Spotify listening data analysis tool. Visualises personal music statistics.

### Monitora Vagas

**URL**: https://mpbarbosa.com/monitora_vagas/public/
**Repo**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/monitora_vagas
Hotel vacancy monitoring web app for AFPESP union members.

### MapaSP

**URL**: https://mpbarbosa.com/mapasp/
Interactive map of São Paulo built with AI-assisted development.

### mpb_scripts

**Repo**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/mpb_scripts
Collection of Linux shell utility scripts for automation tasks.

### ibira.js

**Repo**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/ibira.js
Public JavaScript library for basic API fetch operations.

### olinda libraries (TypeScript)

- **olinda_utils.js** (https://github.com/mpbarbosa/olinda_utils.js): General utility functions
- **olinda_shell_interface.js** (https://github.com/mpbarbosa/olinda_shell_interface.js): Linux shell command interface library
- **olinda_orchestrator** (https://github.com/mpbarbosa/olinda_orchestrator): Generic TypeScript orchestrator
- **olinda_copilot_sdk.ts** (https://github.com/mpbarbosa/olinda_copilot_sdk.ts): GitHub Copilot SDK wrapper

### paraty_geocore.js

**Repo**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/paraty_geocore.js
JavaScript core classes for geolocation applications.

### pajussara_tui_comp

**Repo**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/pajussara_tui_comp
Ink TUI component library in TypeScript.

### gitx

**Repo**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/gitx
TypeScript Ink TUI app for git commands with MCP integration.

### bessa_patterns.ts

**Repo**: https://github.com/mpbarbosa/bessa_patterns.ts
Library of reusable programming patterns in TypeScript.

---

## Site structure

| Path | Description |
|---|---|
| `/` | Portuguese portfolio (primary, pt-BR) |
| `/en/` | English portfolio (investor-facing, includes Singularity section) |
| `/llms.txt` | Concise LLM-readable site summary (this domain's llmstxt.org entry) |
| `/llms-full.txt` | Complete structured context for AI agents |
| `/v1/` | Archived previous site version (HTML5 UP Dimension template) |
| `/pages/` | HTML redirect stubs to sibling project directories |

---
